content.claim: Since 2013, school maintenance authority has been centralized in the Klebelsberg Centre and 60 district sub-units under state control, but this jurisdiction does not extend to schools operated by church, foundation, nationality-government, or purely private entities.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: The phrase 'does not extend to' describes formal jurisdictional boundaries; it does not specify the proportion of 6/8-year gimnázium enrollments that occur in non-state-maintained schools.
Church and foundation gimnázium programs are numerically significant but their exact share of early-selection capacity is not quantified in the notes.
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
